items.title_en: Protests in Ukraine's cities against Zelensky's removal of defence minister
items.title_zh: 乌克兰各城市举行抗议活动，抗议泽连斯基罢免国防部长
items.desc_en: Ukraine's president has not explained Mykhailo Fedorov's dismissal, which is causing great upset among civil society and the military.
items.desc_zh: 乌克兰总统没有解释米哈伊洛·费多罗夫被解职的原因，这引起了民间社会和军方的极大不满。

items.title_en: Nvidia unveils new AI model and expands Japan’s physical AI ecosystem
items.title_zh: 英伟达推出新的人工智能模型并扩展日本的物理人工智能生态系统
items.desc_en: Nvidia announces new AI model, Cosmos 3 Edge, and expansion of its physical AI ecosystems in Japan.
items.desc_zh: Nvidia 宣布推出新的 AI 模型 Cosmos 3 Edge，并扩展其在日本的物理 AI 生态系统。

items.title_en: Fraud crackdown on Ghana ID cards makes digital checks compulsory - photocopies banned
items.title_zh: 加纳身份证欺诈行动强制要求进行数字检查——禁止复印
items.desc_en: Companies are now required to verify a person's identity electronically to curb theft and forgery.
items.desc_zh: 公司现在需要以电子方式验证个人身份，以遏制盗窃和伪造行为。

items.title_en: 'Moment of joy' as Uganda discharges last Ebola patient
items.title_zh: 乌干达最后一名埃博拉患者出院，“欢乐时刻”
items.desc_en: Most of the recent cases were among travellers from the Democratic Republic of Congo.
items.desc_zh: 最近的大多数病例都是来自刚果民主共和国的旅行者。

items.title_en: BlackRock posted blowout earnings. JPMorgan says the asset management giant is a buy
items.title_zh: 贝莱德公布井喷式盈利。摩根大通称这家资产管理巨头值得买入
items.desc_en: The investment bank upgraded the asset management giant to overweight from neutral.
items.desc_zh: 该投行将这家资产管理巨头的评级从“中性”上调至“增持”。

items.title_en: U.S. grocery slowdown deepens as shoppers buy fewer items, raising pressure on food companies
items.title_zh: 由于购物者购买的商品减少，美国食品杂货销售放缓加剧，给食品公司带来压力
items.desc_en: New data show the U.S. grocery slowdown is deepening as shoppers buy fewer items, forcing grocers and brands to compete harder on price and value.
items.desc_zh: 新数据显示，随着购物者购买的商品减少，美国食品杂货销售放缓正在加剧，迫使食品杂货商和品牌在价格和价值上更加激烈地竞争。

items.title_en: Teen hackers who live streamed cyber-attack on TfL jailed
items.title_zh: 直播伦敦交通局网络攻击的青少年黑客被判入狱
items.desc_en: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair were convicted for their roles in the attack, which led to large costs for Transport for London.
items.desc_zh: 欧文·弗劳尔斯（Owen Flowers）和塔哈·朱贝尔（Thalha Jubair）因参与袭击而被定罪，这给伦敦交通局带来了巨额损失。

items.title_en: Wall Street's profit boom has Europe ripping up its banking rulebook
items.title_zh: 华尔街的利润繁荣让欧洲撕毁了银行业规则手册
items.desc_en: A major overhaul of Europe's banking rules could provide a boost to the continent's banking sector.
items.desc_zh: 对欧洲银行规则的重大改革可能会提振欧洲大陆的银行业。

items.title_en: Eli Lilly to buy psychedelics maker AtaiBeckley for $2.8 billion as experimental treatments gain traction
items.title_zh: 礼来公司 (Eli Lilly) 以 28 亿美元收购迷幻药制造商 AtaiBeckley，因为实验性治疗方法受到关注
items.desc_en: The deal for AtaiBeckley gives Lilly access to experimental drugs based on DMT and MDMA.
items.desc_zh: AtaiBeckley 的交易使礼来公司能够获得基于 DMT 和 MDMA 的实验药物。

items.title_en: Chip giant TSMC pledges another $100bn to expand US production
items.title_zh: 芯片巨头台积电承诺再投入1000亿美元扩大美国产能
items.desc_en: The company says it will create "high-tech, high-paying jobs", and raises its total commitment to the US to $265bn.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示将创造“高科技、高薪就业岗位”，并将其对美国的总承诺提高至 2650 亿美元。

items.title_en: Moment US Navy jet stuns packed Florida beach with low flypast
items.title_zh: 美国海军喷气式飞机低空飞行震撼拥挤的佛罗里达海滩
items.desc_en: A US Navy Blue Angels jet sent some beach items up in the air as it flew at a low altitude over a crowd in Pensacola Beach, Florida.
items.desc_zh: 美国海军蓝天使队的一架喷气式飞机在佛罗里达州彭萨科拉海滩的人群上空低空飞行，向空中发射了一些海滩物品。

items.title_en: UnitedHealth blows past estimates, hikes earnings outlook as it reins in costs
items.title_zh: 联合健康集团控制成本，超出预期并上调盈利前景
items.desc_en: The healthcare giant is working to stabilize margins by shrinking membership, exiting unprofitable contracts and pouring $1.5 billion into AI.
items.desc_zh: 这家医疗保健巨头正在努力通过减少会员数量、退出无利可图的合同以及向人工智能领域投入 15 亿美元来稳定利润。

items.title_en: How a fuming Trump reversed ICE's pause on vehicle stops - Axios
items.title_zh: 愤怒的特朗普如何扭转 ICE 暂停车辆停靠的规定 - Axios

items.title_en: Ukrainians take to the streets after Zelenskyy ousts defense minister in surprise shake-up
items.title_zh: 泽伦斯基出人意料地罢免国防部长后，乌克兰人走上街头
items.desc_en: Ukrainian protesters took to the streets of Kyiv on Thursday, decrying Zelenskyy's surprise decision to dismiss Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov.
items.desc_zh: 乌克兰抗议者周四走上基辅街头，谴责泽连斯基解雇国防部长米哈伊洛·费多罗夫的意外决定。

items.title_en: Eleven people die in fire at Algerian foster care home
items.title_zh: 阿尔及利亚寄养院火灾造成11人死亡
items.desc_en: Along with the fatalities, 19 people suffered injuries, the authorities say.
items.desc_zh: 当局称，除了死亡之外，还有 19 人受伤。

items.title_en: Iran warns U.S. of Hormuz ‘red line,’ says it will retaliate to Trump’s strike threats
items.title_zh: 伊朗警告美国霍尔木兹“红线”，称将对特朗普的袭击威胁进行报复
items.desc_en: Trump warned that the U.S. will target Iranian infrastructure next week if negotiations do not resume.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普警告称，如果谈判不恢复，美国下周将针对伊朗基础设施。

items.title_en: $100 million New Jersey deli fraud defendant Patten wants no prison time despite past conviction
items.title_zh: 新泽西州熟食店诈骗案被告帕顿（Patten）涉案金额达一亿美元，尽管曾被定罪，但仍不希望入狱
items.desc_en: James Patten is the person to be sentenced for a scheme that sent the market capitalization of a company that owned just a small New Jersey deli soaring.
items.desc_zh: 詹姆斯·帕滕 (James Patten) 因一项计划而被判刑，该计划导致一家仅拥有新泽西州一家小型熟食店的公司的市值飙升。

items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦抵制英国驱逐诱拐团伙头目的企图
items.desc_en: The government of Pakistan says it has "no connection whatsoever" with the case of Shabir Ahmed.
items.desc_zh: 巴基斯坦政府表示，与沙比尔​​·艾哈迈德案“没有任何关系”。

items.title_zh: TikTok 因儿童年龄检查面临 Ofcom 调查
items.desc_en: It follows a review by the regulator in May that criticised the platform for not being "safe enough" for children.
items.desc_zh: 此前，监管机构在五月份进行了一项审查，批评该平台对儿童来说“不够安全”。

items.title_en: Iran targets military bases as US launches wave of strikes
items.title_zh: 美国发起一波袭击，伊朗瞄准军事基地
items.desc_en: Explosions were heard across Iran overnight, shortly after neighbouring Gulf states began to report attacks.
items.desc_zh: 就在邻近的海湾国家开始报告袭击事件后不久，伊朗各地隔夜传来爆炸声。

items.title_zh: 美国因“不公平贸易行为”对大多数巴西商品征收25%的关税

items.title_en: Argentina face fine for Falklands banner in semi-final win
items.title_zh: 阿根廷在半决赛中因福克兰群岛旗帜而面临罚款
items.desc_en: Argentina face the prospect of a Fifa fine after their players celebrated the World Cup semi-final win against England with a banner in support of their country's claims to the Falkland Islands.
items.desc_zh: 阿根廷队球员在世界杯半决赛战胜英格兰队时举起支持阿根廷对福克兰群岛主权的横幅庆祝，因此面临国际足联的罚款。

items.title_en: Analysis: Fed Chairman Warsh faces an inflation credibility test after Congress hearings
items.title_zh: 分析：国会听证会后美联储主席沃什面临通胀可信度考验
items.desc_en: The new Fed chairman avoided major stumbles in two days of testimony before the House and Senate, but faces a rapid test of his commitment to price stability.
items.desc_zh: 这位新任美联储主席在众议院和参议院两天的证词中避免了重大失误，但他对价格稳定的承诺面临着快速考验。

items.title_en: United earnings top estimates but airline expects $6 billion in added fuel costs
items.title_zh: 美联航盈利高于预期，但航空公司预计燃油成本增加 60 亿美元
items.desc_en: United reported higher revenue for premium, corporate and no-frills basic economy tickets and higher revenue for both domestic and international trips.
items.desc_zh: 美联航报告称，高级机票、公司机票和经济舱机票的收入有所增加，国内和国际旅行的收入也有所增加。

items.title_en: Trump blasts New York AI data center moratorium, says state should change policy 'immediately'
items.title_zh: 特朗普抨击纽约人工智能数据中心暂停，称州政府应“立即”改变政策
items.desc_en: New York became the first state in the U.S. to impose a ban of its kind when the governor signed the executive order Tuesday.
items.desc_zh: 当州长周二签署行政命令时，纽约州成为美国第一个实施此类禁令的州。

items.title_en: Trump's pick to head national intelligence, Jay Clayton, won't tell senators Biden won the 2020 election
items.title_zh: 特朗普选择的国家情报总监杰伊·克莱顿不会告诉参议员拜登赢得了 2020 年大选
items.desc_en: The Senate Intelligence Committee is considering Jay Clayton's nomination to be the director of national intelligence.
items.desc_zh: 参议院情报委员会正在考虑提名杰伊·克莱顿担任国家情报总监。

items.title_en: SpaceX share price drops below stock market debut
items.title_zh: SpaceX 股价跌破上市首日价
items.desc_en: Share trading in Elon Musk’s rocket company has been volatile since it went public a month ago.
items.desc_zh: 埃隆·马斯克的火箭公司自一个月前上市以来，其股票交易一直波动较大。

items.title_en: The Eureka Database
items.title_zh: The Eureka Database
items.desc_en: Turn a Reddit complaint into your next company
items.desc_zh: 将 Reddit 投诉转化为你的下一家公司

items.title_en: More people around the world now favour China over the US, Pew study suggests
items.title_zh: 皮尤研究中心显示，现在世界上越来越多的人支持中国而不是美国
items.desc_en: There is more confidence in Xi Jinping than Donald Trump, the US think tank's survey indicates.
items.desc_zh: 美国智库的调查显示，人们对习近平的信心比对唐纳德·特朗普的信心更高。

items.title_en: Weave
items.title_zh: Weave
items.desc_en: Think out loud and watch it become a living map.
items.desc_zh: 大声思考，看着它变成一张活生生的地图。

items.title_en: FlightGlitch
items.title_zh: FlightGlitch
items.desc_en: Catch mistake fares before airlines fix them
items.desc_zh: 在航空公司修复之前发现错误票价

items.title_en: DevSwat
items.title_zh: DevSwat
items.desc_en: Turn codebases into interactive maps, graphs, and governance
items.desc_zh: 将代码库转变为交互式地图、图表和治理

items.title_en: Graft AI
items.title_zh: Graft AI
items.desc_en: Turn company operations into a living map for agents
items.desc_zh: 将公司运营变成代理商的活地图

items.title_en: Midnight social media curfew proposed for UK teens aged 16 and 17
items.title_zh: 英国提议对 16 岁和 17 岁青少年实行午夜社交媒体宵禁
items.desc_en: The government says it will improve teenagers' lives but campaigners call it a "missed opportunity".
items.desc_zh: 政府表示这将改善青少年的生活，但活动人士称这是“错失的机会”。

items.title_en: Verse
items.title_zh: Verse
items.desc_en: Build and hire autonomous AI employees from a single prompt
items.desc_zh: 通过单一提示即可建立和雇用自主人工智能员工

items.title_en: BrickSolvr
items.title_zh: BrickSolvr
items.desc_en: Turn any 3D model into a buildable brick model
items.desc_zh: 将任何 3D 模型转变为可搭建的砖块模型

items.title_en: Node Health
items.title_zh: Node Health
items.desc_en: Your private home for every lab result
items.desc_zh: 每个实验室结果的私人家

items.title_en: Amami
items.title_zh: Amami
items.desc_en: Analytics that lives inside your AI assistant
items.desc_zh: 人工智能助手内部的分析功能

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Surgeons remotely control two human-like robots in an operating theatre.
items.desc_zh: 外科医生在手术室中远程控制两个类人机器人。

items.title_en: Nitrosend
items.title_zh: Nitrosend
items.desc_en: Email for AI agents. They sign up, send and reply.
items.desc_zh: AI 代理的电子邮件。他们注册、发送并回复。

items.title_en: Breadcromb
items.title_zh: Breadcromb
items.desc_en: A browser that remembers everything and can act on anything
items.desc_zh: 一个可以记住一切并且可以对任何事情采取行动的浏览器

items.title_en: ChikitAI
items.title_zh: ChikitAI
items.desc_en: Agentic AI for Healthcare Triage and Care Automation
items.desc_zh: 用于医疗保健分诊和护理自动化的代理人工智能

items.title_en: In Parallel MCP
items.title_zh: In Parallel MCP
items.desc_en: Your context, available to every agent.
items.desc_zh: 您的背景信息可供每个代理使用。

items.title_en: Cito
items.title_zh: Cito
items.desc_en: Hybrid academic search over 236M papers, built for agents
items.desc_zh: 为代理商打造超过 2.36 亿篇论文的混合学术搜索

items.title_en: Manta AI
items.title_zh: Manta AI
items.desc_en: Your AI agent for autonomous web app testing
items.desc_zh: 用于自主 Web 应用程序测试的 AI 代理

items.title_en: WorkflowMaps
items.title_zh: WorkflowMaps
items.desc_en: Workflow mapping for consultants running multiple clients
items.desc_zh: 运行多个客户的顾问的工作流程映射

items.title_en: Microflow
items.title_zh: Microflow
items.desc_en: Microcontrollers made simple.
items.desc_zh: 微控制器变得简单。

items.title_en: SIMPLI
items.title_zh: SIMPLI
items.desc_en: Split expenses in a live cosmos
items.desc_zh: 在生动的宇宙中分摊费用

items.title_en: 10 years of Pokémon Go and the millions still trying to catch 'em all
items.title_zh: 《Pokémon Go》问世 10 周年，数百万人仍在尝试捕捉它们
items.desc_en: Michael Steranka, vice president at the mobile game's owner Scopely, says it has always been about bringing people together.
items.desc_zh: 手机游戏所有者 Scopely 的副总裁迈克尔·斯特兰卡 (Michael Steranka) 表示，这款游戏一直致力于将人们聚集在一起。

items.title_en: Meta pulls new AI image feature after days of backlash
items.title_zh: 经过几天的强烈反对后，Meta 取消了新的人工智能图像功能
items.desc_en: Meta's release this week of an AI feature that let people alter Instagram content drew swift blowback.
items.desc_zh: Meta 本周发布了一项人工智能功能，可以让人们改变 Instagram 内容，但很快就引起了反弹。

items.title_en: Is the Assassin's Creed Black Flag remake worth the 13 year wait?
items.title_zh: 《刺客信条：黑旗》重制版值得 13 年的等待吗？
items.desc_en: The BBC's Tom Gerken plays the much-anticipated pirate game which has been remade from the ground up.
items.desc_zh: BBC 的汤姆·格肯 (Tom Gerken) 扮演了这款备受期待的海盗游戏，该游戏已从头开始重制。

items.title_en: Apple sues OpenAI, its employees claiming theft of trade secrets
items.title_zh: 苹果起诉 OpenAI，其员工声称窃取商业机密
items.desc_en: Apple said in a Friday lawsuit that OpenAI’s nascent hardware business is “rotten to its core.”
items.desc_zh: 苹果在周五的诉讼中表示，OpenAI 新兴的硬件业务“已经烂到了核心”。

items.title_en: EU threatens Meta with fines over 'addictive' Facebook and Instagram
items.title_zh: 欧盟因 Facebook 和 Instagram 上瘾而对 Meta 进行罚款威胁
items.desc_en: Regulators say features such as infinite scroll contribute to "compulsive use" and "unhealthy habits".
items.desc_zh: 监管机构表示，无限滚动等功能会导致“强迫性使用”和“不健康的习惯”。

items.title_en: Big tech must deal with scam ads under Ofcom proposals
items.title_zh: 根据 Ofcom 的提议，大型科技公司必须处理诈骗广告
items.desc_en: Ofcom says more than half of UK adults have encountered potentially fraudulent ads online.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，超过一半的英国成年人在网上遇到过潜在的欺诈性广告。

items.title_en: 'Cool in 90 seconds' - the fake portable air conditioners sweeping the internet
items.title_zh: “90秒制冷”——假冒移动空调席卷网络
items.desc_en: The ASA says adverts claiming small devices can rapidly cool rooms were too good to be true.
items.desc_zh: ASA 表示，声称小型设备可以快速冷却房间的广告好得令人难以置信。

items.title_en: Pressure builds on Europe's biggest port to be greener
items.title_zh: 欧洲最大港口面临更加环保的压力
items.desc_en: A lawsuit demands that the Port of Rotterdam moves faster to cut its dependence on fossil fuel firms.
items.desc_zh: 一项诉讼要求鹿特丹港加快行动，减少对化石燃料公司的依赖。

items.title_en: Porn site company fined £630,000 over failed age checks
items.title_zh: 色情网站公司因未通过年龄检查被罚款 63 万英镑
items.desc_en: Ofcom has fined a slew of sites it says are failing to prevent children accessing their adult content.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 对大量网站进行了罚款，称其未能阻止儿童访问其成人内容。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: The impact screen time is having on younger children.
items.desc_zh: 屏幕时间对年幼的孩子有影响。

items.title_en: Paradigm
items.title_zh: Paradigm
items.desc_en: Turn any goal into a personalized, adaptive learning path.
items.desc_zh: 将任何目标转变为个性化、适应性学习路径。
